---
title: ""
description: "Personal website of Gaurav Khanal."
page-layout: article
title-block-style: none
---

<div class="hero">

<h1 class="hero-title">Gaurav Khanal</h1>

<p class="hero-subtitle">
Mathematics, machine learning, information geometry, and research notes.
I write about the geometry behind uncertainty, learning systems, and probability.
</p>

<div class="hero-links">
  <a href="blog.html">Blog</a>
  <a href="projects.html">Projects</a>
  <a href="notes.html">Notes</a>
  <a href="cv.html">CV</a>
  <a href="about.html">About</a>
</div>

</div>

## Current writing

I am currently developing a mathematical essay series called **The Geometry of Probability**, starting from Fisher information, optimal transport, KL geometry, and Schrödinger bridges.

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="card">

### The Geometry of Uncertainty

A long-form essay series on information geometry, optimal transport, KL divergence, Schrödinger bridges, and learning.

<a href="blog.html">Read the series →</a>

</div>

<div class="card">

### Research notes

Technical notes, paper summaries, derivations, and working ideas in mathematics and machine learning.

<a href="notes.html">See notes →</a>

</div>

<div class="card">

### Projects

Selected work in machine learning, mathematical modeling, computation, and visualization.

<a href="projects.html">See projects →</a>

</div>

</div>

## Recent focus

My current interests sit at the intersection of geometry, probability, and learning:

- information geometry and Fisher metrics
- optimal transport and Wasserstein geometry
- KL divergence, Bregman geometry, and exponential families
- Schrödinger bridges and Langevin dynamics
- geometric viewpoints on machine learning

## Start here

If you are here for the writing project, start with the blog series:

<a href="blog.html"><strong>The Geometry of Uncertainty →</strong></a>
